name: House of Architects
tagline: You see the blueprint before anyone else.
description: Systems thinkers and long-term builders. Architects see the structure underneath everything and design from first principles. They don't rush to market , they engineer foundations that outlast trends, building cathedrals while others build tents.
warning: Can over-engineer. Perfectionism delays shipping. Sometimes the blueprint matters more to them than the building.

lineage.name: Leonardo da Vinci
lineage.achievement: Renaissance polymath who designed flying machines 400 years before flight, mapped human anatomy, and painted the most famous artwork in history.
lineage.quote: I have been impressed with the urgency of doing. Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Being willing is not enough; we must do.
lineage.quantified_impact: Designed flying machines 400 years before aviation. 13,000+ pages of notebooks still referenced in engineering today.
lineage.connectionLine: You both see the blueprint before anyone else can , and you both refuse to separate art from engineering.

lineage.name: Nikola Tesla
lineage.achievement: Invented AC power, laid the foundations of radio, and envisioned wireless energy transfer , powering the modern world from a notebook.
lineage.quote: The present is theirs; the future, for which I really worked, is mine.
lineage.quantified_impact: His AC power system delivers electricity to 5.5 billion people every day. 300 patents across 50 countries.
lineage.connectionLine: You both build for a future that hasn't arrived yet, trusting that the world will catch up to what you already see.

lineage.name: A.R. Rahman
lineage.achievement: Composed music that bridged Indian classical ragas and Western electronic production, winning two Oscars, two Grammys, and a nation's devotion.
lineage.quote: I think music is the greatest art form that exists, and I think people listen to music for different reasons, and it serves different purposes.
lineage.quantified_impact: Sold 300M+ albums globally. India's highest-grossing film composer. Oscar, Grammy, and BAFTA — only Indian to hold all three.
lineage.connectionLine: You both obsess over invisible architecture , the structure beneath the surface that most people only feel but never see.

lineage.name: Jensen Huang
lineage.achievement: Built NVIDIA from a gaming chip company into the $2 trillion backbone of the AI revolution, betting on parallel computing before anyone understood why it mattered.
lineage.quote: Our company has only thirty days to live. The difference between a company with thirty days to live and one that lasts thirty years is just perception.
lineage.quantified_impact: Built NVIDIA from $0 to $3.3 trillion — the world's most valuable company. His GPU architecture powers 90% of all AI training globally.
lineage.connectionLine: You both have the patience to build infrastructure the world doesn't know it needs yet , and the conviction to keep building until it does.

collective_impact: Built systems that outlasted empires. Their work still runs the world.

name: House of Vanguards
description: Natural leaders who move first, move fast, and bring people with them. Vanguards don't just see what needs to change , they change it. Force of will is their superpower, and hesitation is the only enemy they respect.
warning: Can steamroll. Impatience looks like vision when things are going well and recklessness when they're not. Not everyone moves at your speed.

lineage.name: Sun Tzu
lineage.achievement: Wrote the definitive text on strategy that still guides military commanders, CEOs, and founders 2,500 years after his death.
lineage.quote: In the midst of chaos, there is also opportunity. Victorious warriors win first and then go to war, while defeated warriors go to war first and then seek to win.
lineage.quantified_impact: The Art of War cited by 47 of Fortune 500 CEOs. Applied in military strategy across 2,500 years and 54 countries. Still in print after 2,500 years.
lineage.connectionLine: You both understand that the battle is won before it begins , through preparation, positioning, and the will to act when others deliberate.

lineage.name: Nelson Mandela
lineage.achievement: Spent 27 years in prison, emerged unbroken, and united a nation , dismantling apartheid without civil war through sheer moral authority.
lineage.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
lineage.quantified_impact: Freed 56 million people from apartheid. Served 27 years in prison without breaking. Built South Africa's democracy from prison cell to presidency.
lineage.connectionLine: You both know that real leadership isn't about speed , it's about the unshakeable conviction that keeps you moving when everyone else has stopped.

lineage.name: Rihanna
lineage.achievement: Built Fenty into a $2.8 billion beauty empire by seeing the massive market gap that the entire industry had ignored for decades.
lineage.quote: There's something so special about a woman who dominates in a man's world. It takes a certain grace, strength, intelligence, fearlessness, and the nerve to never take no for an answer.
lineage.quantified_impact: Built $1.4 billion Fenty Beauty in 4 years. Expanded foundation range to 50 shades — forcing every major cosmetics brand to follow. 260M social followers.
lineage.connectionLine: You both saw what the incumbents refused to see, moved before you had permission, and built something the market didn't know it was starving for.

lineage.name: Satya Nadella
lineage.achievement: Transformed Microsoft from a stagnating giant into the world's most valuable company by betting everything on cloud, culture, and a growth mindset.
lineage.quote: Our industry does not respect tradition , it only respects innovation.
lineage.quantified_impact: Grew Microsoft from $300B to $3.1 trillion in 10 years. Bet the company on cloud + AI. Turned around a company everyone wrote off.
lineage.connectionLine: You both know that the hardest transformation isn't technological , it's getting a hundred thousand people to believe the future you see is worth fighting for.

collective_impact: Led movements that changed entire markets. Went first so the world could follow.

name: House of Alchemists
tagline: You see connections no one else can.
description: Pattern-matchers and synthesizers. Alchemists see the invisible thread between unrelated domains and weave them into something entirely new. Their genius is combination , they don't invent from nothing, they transmute the ordinary into the extraordinary.
warning: Can get lost in abstraction. The connections are real to you but invisible to your team. Brilliance without execution is just daydreaming.

lineage.name: Rumi
lineage.achievement: A 13th-century poet whose writings on love, loss, and human connection transcended centuries , selling millions of copies in 2024, eight hundred years after his death.
lineage.quote: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
lineage.quantified_impact: His poetry translated into 23 languages. Best-selling poet in the USA in 2023 — 800 years after writing. 66,000 verses that still generate licensing revenue.
lineage.connectionLine: You both understand that the deepest truths are felt before they are understood , and that the right words can reshape how an entire civilization sees itself.

lineage.name: Albert Einstein
lineage.achievement: Reimagined the fabric of space and time while working as a patent clerk, producing four papers in one year that rewrote the laws of physics.
lineage.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited. Imagination encircles the world.
lineage.quantified_impact: E=mc² enables every nuclear power plant and MRI machine on earth. GPS wouldn't work without his relativity equations — a $150B industry depends on his theory.
lineage.connectionLine: You both ask the questions nobody thinks to ask , and then sit with them long enough to hear answers that change everything.

lineage.name: Steve Jobs
lineage.achievement: Combined calligraphy, Zen Buddhism, and computing into products that redefined personal technology , creating not just devices, but an entirely new relationship between humans and machines.
lineage.quote: Creativity is just connecting things. When you ask creative people how they did something, they feel a little guilty because they didn't really do it, they just saw something.
lineage.quantified_impact: Created 3 industry-defining products (Mac, iPod, iPhone). Apple went from near-bankruptcy in 1997 to $3T in 2023. 1.5 billion active Apple devices today.
lineage.connectionLine: You both see connections that are invisible to everyone else , and you both have the stubbornness to keep building until the world sees them too.

lineage.name: Sam Altman
lineage.achievement: Guided Y Combinator's golden era, then steered OpenAI through the most consequential technology launch since the internet , surviving a boardroom coup along the way.
lineage.quote: The most counterintuitive secret about startups is that it's often easier to succeed with a hard startup than an easy one.
lineage.quantified_impact: Launched ChatGPT to 100 million users in 5 days — fastest product in history. OpenAI valued at $157B. Triggered the global AI race across every industry.
lineage.connectionLine: You both operate at the intersection of technology and human nature , understanding that the hardest problems aren't technical, they're about what people actually need.

collective_impact: Turned ideas into entirely new categories. Created things that didn't exist before.

name: House of Pathfinders
tagline: You find roads that don't exist yet.
description: Explorers and pioneers. Pathfinders go where nobody has gone and make it look inevitable in hindsight. They are comfortable with uncertainty because that's where all the alpha is , the frontier is not a risk to them, it's home.
warning: Can confuse novelty with progress. Not every uncharted path leads somewhere. Sometimes the road doesn't exist because nobody needs it.

lineage.name: Amelia Earhart
lineage.achievement: First woman to fly solo across the Atlantic, shattering the boundaries of what was considered possible and redefining courage for an entire generation.
lineage.quote: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity. The fears are paper tigers. You can do anything you decide to do.
lineage.quantified_impact: First woman to fly solo across the Atlantic (3,300 km, 14 hours). Inspired 1 million+ women to enter aviation. Her legacy funded 500+ aviation scholarships.
lineage.connectionLine: You both know that the only way to prove a path exists is to walk it , and you both chose to fly instead.

lineage.name: Charles Darwin
lineage.achievement: Spent 20 years patiently developing the theory of evolution, building an airtight case that would fundamentally reshape how humanity understands life itself.
lineage.quote: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent that survives. It is the one that is most adaptable to change.
lineage.quantified_impact: 5-year solo voyage → theory that became the foundation of all biology. 170 years of evolutionary science built on his framework. Evolution cited in 500K+ academic papers.
lineage.connectionLine: You both have the rare patience to sit with a world-changing idea until the evidence is undeniable , and the courage to publish it when it is.

lineage.name: Christopher Nolan
lineage.achievement: Bent the rules of cinema with non-linear storytelling, turning art-house concepts into billion-dollar blockbusters and proving mass audiences crave complexity.
lineage.quote: Every film should have its own world, a logic and feel to it that expands beyond the exact narrative.
lineage.quantified_impact: Directed 12 films totalling $6B in global box office. Created new narrative structures (non-linear storytelling) adopted by 40% of prestige TV since 2010.
lineage.connectionLine: You both refuse to choose between ambition and originality , proving that the most rewarding path is the one no one believed an audience existed for.

lineage.name: Elon Musk
lineage.achievement: Simultaneously disrupted automotive, aerospace, and energy , turning science fiction into manufacturing lines and making Mars colonization a serious engineering project.
lineage.quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favour.
lineage.quantified_impact: Put reusable rockets into orbit (80% cost reduction). 6,000 Starlink satellites. 3M Tesla EVs on road. SpaceX valued at $350B. Simultaneously running 6 companies.
lineage.connectionLine: You both look at the frontier and see not risk but inevitability , and you both have the audacity to build the road while everyone else debates whether to take it.

collective_impact: Went first so others could follow. Proved it was possible so others could dare.
